results.title: All about Skateboard Trucks | Wiki | skatedeluxe Blog
results.snippet: 1.1 Baseplate The base plate is the base layer, or foundation, of the truck. It's mounted to the skateboard with 4 bolts. The kingpin and the pivot cup can be found in the base plate.
